---
title: "Rice heat-stress"
format: 
  html:
      grid: 
        body-width: 1000px
        sidebar-width: 0px
        margin-width: 200px
      toc: true
editor: source
execute: 
  eval: true
  echo: false
  include: false
  warning: false
fig-dpi: 660
fig-format: png
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r}
suppressMessages({
    rm(list = ls())
    gc()
    set.seed(123)
    if (!is.null(dev.list())) dev.off()
    
    source("https://github.com/P10911004-NPUST/statools/blob/main/R/oneway_test.R?raw=TRUE")
    
    library(tidyverse)
    library(geomtextpath)
    library(plotly)
})
```

# Heat treatment after 2-days after germination

| Microscope parameter | Value  |
|:--------------------:|:------:|
|    Exposure time     | 500 ms |
|         Cost         |  2.0   |
|   Light intensity    |  30%   |
|    Visual Magnif.    |  50X   |

<br>

```{r}
csv_list <- list.files("../img/NBT/", pattern = "\\.csv$", full.names = TRUE, recursive = TRUE)
csv_list <- csv_list[grep("OUT_DAT", csv_list)]
csv_list <- csv_list[-grep("over3leaf", csv_list)]

rawdata <- map(csv_list, read.csv) %>% list_rbind()
rawdata <- rawdata %>% 
    mutate(
        DAT = as.factor(str_replace(img_name, ".*DAT(\\d(\\d)?).*", "\\1")),
        TEMP = as.factor(str_replace(img_name, ".*T(\\d(\\d)?).*", "\\1")),
        REP = as.numeric(str_replace(img_name, ".*R(\\d(\\d)?).*", "\\1")),
        ROOT_TYPE = factor(str_extract(img_name, "Se|Cr|postCr")),
        nbt_mean = nbt_intensity / nbt_area,
        nbt_intensity = nbt_intensity / 1e6,
        nbt_area = nbt_area / 1000,
        is_good_data = !(str_detect(img_name, "cancel") | is.na(nbt_area) | is.na(nbt_intensity))
    )

root_n <- rawdata %>%
    group_by(DAT, TEMP, REP) %>% 
    count(ROOT_TYPE, .drop = FALSE) %>% 
    ungroup() %>% 
    summarise(
        AVG = mean(n), 
        SE = sd(n) / sqrt(length(n)),
        .by = c(DAT, TEMP, ROOT_TYPE)
    )

desc_df <- rawdata %>% 
    filter(is_good_data) %>% 
    summarise(
        area_mean = mean(nbt_area),
        area_max = max(nbt_area),
        intensity_mean = mean(nbt_intensity),
        intensity_max = max(nbt_intensity),
        .by = c(DAT, TEMP, ROOT_TYPE)
    )
```

# Root type emergence

```{r, include=TRUE}
#| label: fig-root-emergence
#| fig-cap: "Emergence of different root types after 2-5 days of 28&deg;C (blue) and 38&deg;C (red) heat treatment. Se: Seminal root, Cr: embryonic crown root, postCr: post-embryonic crown root."

root_n <- filter(root_n, ROOT_TYPE != "Se")
root_n$group <- as.factor(paste(root_n$TEMP, root_n$ROOT_TYPE))

p0 <- root_n %>% 
    ggplot(aes(DAT, AVG, color = TEMP, linetype = ROOT_TYPE, group = group, label = ROOT_TYPE)) +
    theme_minimal() +
    labs(
        x = "Days after treatment", 
        y = "Number of roots", 
        color = "Temperature (\u00B0C)", 
        linetype = element_blank()
    ) +
    geom_point(size = 2) +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = AVG - SE, ymax = AVG + SE), width = 0.1, alpha = 0.7) +
    geom_textline(linewidth = 0.5, hjust = 0.92, size = 5) +
    scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 5)) +
    scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set1", direction = -1) +
    theme(
        text = element_text(family = "sans", face = "bold", size = 20),
        axis.title.x.bottom = element_text(margin = margin(t = 10)),
        axis.title.y.left = element_text(margin = margin(r = 10)),
        legend.position = "none",
        legend.title = element_text(size = 16),
        legend.text = element_text(face = "plain", size = 14)
    )
p0
```

# NBT staining intensity

<!-- # Statistics -->

```{r}
stat_res_0 <- data.frame()
for (dat in unique(rawdata$DAT)){
    df0 <- rawdata %>% filter(DAT == dat)
    for (root in unique(df0$ROOT_TYPE)){
        df1 <- df0 %>% 
            filter(ROOT_TYPE == root) %>% 
            filter(is_good_data) %>% 
            drop_na()
        
        sample_size <- df1 %>% 
            count(TEMP)
        
        if (any(sample_size$n < 3)) next
        
        res <- oneway_test(df1, nbt_intensity ~ TEMP)$results
        res$ROOT_TYPE <- root
        res$DAT <- dat
        
        stat_res_0 <- rbind(stat_res_0, res)
    }
}
```

<!-- # Plotting -->

```{r}
p0 <- list()
for (dat in unique(rawdata$DAT)){
    stat_res_1 <- stat_res_0 %>% 
        filter(DAT == dat)
    
    df0 <- rawdata %>% 
        filter(DAT == dat, is_good_data) %>% 
        filter(ROOT_TYPE %in% unique(stat_res_1$ROOT_TYPE)) %>% 
        drop_na()
    
    y_range <- c(floor(min(stat_res_1$MIN) * 0.85), ceiling(max(stat_res_1$MAX) * 1.25))
    letter_nudge_y <- (y_range[2] - max(stat_res_1$MAX)) * 0.43
    
    p1 <- ggplot(df0, aes(TEMP, nbt_intensity, color = TEMP, text = img_name)) +
        facet_wrap( ~ factor(ROOT_TYPE, levels = c("Se", "Cr", "postCr")), ncol = 3) +
        theme_bw() +
        labs(
            subtitle = paste0("DAT", dat),
            x = "Temperature (\u00B0C)", 
            y = "NBT intensity"
        ) +
        geom_point(position = position_jitter(width = 0.1)) +
        geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.3, outlier.shape = NA, outliers = FALSE) +
        geom_text(
            data = stat_res_1,
            mapping = aes(indep_var, MAX + letter_nudge_y, label = letter),
            size = 7,
            inherit.aes = FALSE
        ) +
        scale_y_continuous(limits = y_range) +
        scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set1", direction = -1) +
        theme(
            text = element_text(family = "sans", face = "bold", size = 20),
            axis.title.x.bottom = element_text(margin = margin(t = 10)),
            axis.title.y.left = element_text(margin = margin(r = 10)),
            legend.position = "none"
        )
    
    p1 <- list(p1)
    names(p1) <- paste("DAT", dat, sep = "_")
    p0 <- append(p0, p1)
}
```

## DAT 2

```{r, include=TRUE}
ggplotly(p0$DAT_2)
```

<br>

::: {layout-ncol=3}
![](images/DAT2/DAT2_T28_R1_Se_RAW_ch00.png)

![](images/DAT2/DAT2_T28_R3_Se_RAW_ch00.png)

![](images/DAT2/DAT2_T28_R4_Se_RAW_ch00.png)

Seminal root
:::

::: {layout-ncol=3}
![](images/DAT2/DAT2_T28_R1_Cr1_RAW_ch00.png)

![](images/DAT2/DAT2_T28_R3_Cr1_RAW_ch00.png)

![](images/DAT2/DAT2_T28_R4_Cr1_RAW_ch00.png)

Crown root
:::

<br>

## DAT 3

```{r, include=TRUE}
ggplotly(p0$DAT_3)
```

<br>

::: {layout-ncol=3}
![](images/DAT3/DAT3_T28_R1_Se_RAW_ch00.png)

![](images/DAT3/DAT3_T28_R1_Se_RAW_ch00.png)

![](images/DAT3/DAT3_T28_R1_Se_RAW_ch00.png)

Seminal root
:::

::: {layout-ncol=3}
![](images/DAT2_T28_R1_Cr1_RAW_ch00.png)

![](images/DAT2_T28_R3_Cr1_RAW_ch00.png)

![](images/DAT2_T28_R4_Cr1_RAW_ch00.png)

Crown root
:::

<br>

## DAT 4

```{r, include=TRUE}
ggplotly(p0$DAT_4)
```

<br>

## DAT 5

```{r, include=TRUE}
ggplotly(p0$DAT_5)
```

## DAT3 (Over-3-leaf)

Check for post-embryonic crown root.

| Microscope parameter | Value  |
|:--------------------:|:------:|
|    Exposure time     | 500 ms |
|         Cost         |  2.0   |
|   Light intensity    |  30%   |
|    Visual Magnif.    |  30X   |

<br>

```{r, include=TRUE}
over3leaf <- list.files("../img/NBT/", pattern = "over3leaf", full.names = TRUE, recursive = TRUE)
over3leaf <- read.csv(over3leaf) %>% 
    filter(str_detect(img_name, "30X")) %>% 
    mutate(
        DAT = as.factor(str_replace(img_name, ".*DAT(\\d(\\d)?).*", "\\1")),
        TEMP = as.factor(str_replace(img_name, ".*T(\\d(\\d)?).*", "\\1")),
        REP = as.numeric(str_replace(img_name, ".*R(\\d(\\d)?).*", "\\1")),
        ROOT_TYPE = factor(str_extract(img_name, "Se|Cr|postCr")),
        nbt_intensity = nbt_intensity / 1e6,
        nbt_area = nbt_area / 1000,
        is_good_data = !(str_detect(img_name, "cancel") | is.na(nbt_area) | is.na(nbt_intensity))
    )

stat_res <- oneway_test(over3leaf, nbt_intensity ~ TEMP)$results

y_range <- c(floor(min(stat_res$MIN) * 0.85), ceiling(max(stat_res$MAX) * 1.25))
letter_nudge_y <- (y_range[2] - max(stat_res$MAX)) * 0.43

p1 <- ggplot(over3leaf, aes(TEMP, nbt_intensity, color = TEMP, text = img_name)) +
    facet_wrap( ~ factor(ROOT_TYPE, levels = c("Se", "Cr", "postCr")), ncol = 3) +
    theme_bw() +
    labs(
        subtitle = paste0("DAT", unique(over3leaf$DAT)),
        x = "Temperature (\u00B0C)", 
        y = "NBT intensity"
    ) +
    geom_point(position = position_jitter(width = 0.1)) +
    geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.3, outlier.shape = NA, outliers = FALSE) +
    geom_text(
        data = stat_res,
        mapping = aes(indep_var, MAX + letter_nudge_y, label = letter),
        size = 7,
        inherit.aes = FALSE
    ) +
    scale_y_continuous(limits = y_range) +
    scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set1", direction = -1) +
    theme(
        text = element_text(family = "sans", face = "bold", size = 20),
        axis.title.x.bottom = element_text(margin = margin(t = 10)),
        axis.title.y.left = element_text(margin = margin(r = 10)),
        legend.position = "none"
    )
ggplotly(p1)
```

<br>

# NBT staining intensity average

Averaging the NBT intensity by the staining area seems minimizing the variations. \$ NBT intensity average = \frac{NBT staining intensity}{NBT staining area} \$

<!-- # Statistics -->

```{r}
stat_res_0 <- data.frame()
for (dat in unique(rawdata$DAT)){
    df0 <- rawdata %>% filter(DAT == dat)
    for (root in unique(df0$ROOT_TYPE)){
        df1 <- df0 %>% 
            filter(ROOT_TYPE == root) %>% 
            filter(is_good_data) %>% 
            drop_na()
        
        sample_size <- df1 %>% 
            count(TEMP)
        
        if (any(sample_size$n < 3)) next
        
        res <- oneway_test(df1, nbt_mean ~ TEMP)$results
        res$ROOT_TYPE <- root
        res$DAT <- dat
        
        stat_res_0 <- rbind(stat_res_0, res)
    }
}
```

<!-- # Plotting -->

```{r}
p0 <- list()
for (dat in unique(rawdata$DAT)){
    stat_res_1 <- stat_res_0 %>% 
        filter(DAT == dat)
    
    df0 <- rawdata %>% 
        filter(DAT == dat, is_good_data) %>% 
        filter(ROOT_TYPE %in% unique(stat_res_1$ROOT_TYPE)) %>% 
        drop_na()
    
    y_range <- c(floor(min(stat_res_1$MIN) * 0.85), ceiling(max(stat_res_1$MAX) * 1.25))
    letter_nudge_y <- (y_range[2] - max(stat_res_1$MAX)) * 0.43
    
    p1 <- ggplot(df0, aes(TEMP, nbt_mean, color = TEMP, text = img_name)) +
        facet_wrap( ~ factor(ROOT_TYPE, levels = c("Se", "Cr", "postCr")), ncol = 3) +
        theme_bw() +
        labs(
            subtitle = paste0("DAT", dat),
            x = "Temperature (\u00B0C)", 
            y = "NBT intensity average"
        ) +
        geom_point(position = position_jitter(width = 0.1)) +
        geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.3, outlier.shape = NA, outliers = FALSE) +
        geom_text(
            data = stat_res_1,
            mapping = aes(indep_var, MAX + letter_nudge_y, label = letter),
            size = 7,
            inherit.aes = FALSE
        ) +
        scale_y_continuous(limits = y_range) +
        scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set1", direction = -1) +
        theme(
            text = element_text(family = "sans", face = "bold", size = 20),
            axis.title.x.bottom = element_text(margin = margin(t = 10)),
            axis.title.y.left = element_text(margin = margin(r = 10)),
            legend.position = "none"
        )
    
    p1 <- list(p1)
    names(p1) <- paste("DAT", dat, sep = "_")
    p0 <- append(p0, p1)
}
```

## DAT 2

```{r, include=TRUE}
ggplotly(p0$DAT_2)
```

<br>

## DAT 3

```{r, include=TRUE}
ggplotly(p0$DAT_3)
```

<br>

## DAT 4

```{r, include=TRUE}
ggplotly(p0$DAT_4)
```

<br>

## DAT 5

```{r, include=TRUE}
ggplotly(p0$DAT_5)
```

## DAT3 (Over-3-leaf)

Check for post-embryonic crown root.

| Microscope parameter | Value  |
|:--------------------:|:------:|
|    Exposure time     | 500 ms |
|         Cost         |  2.0   |
|   Light intensity    |  30%   |
|    Visual Magnif.    |  30X   |

```{r, include=TRUE}
over3leaf <- list.files("../img/NBT/", pattern = "over3leaf", full.names = TRUE, recursive = TRUE)
over3leaf <- read.csv(over3leaf) %>% 
    filter(str_detect(img_name, "30X")) %>% 
    mutate(
        DAT = as.factor(str_replace(img_name, ".*DAT(\\d(\\d)?).*", "\\1")),
        TEMP = as.factor(str_replace(img_name, ".*T(\\d(\\d)?).*", "\\1")),
        REP = as.numeric(str_replace(img_name, ".*R(\\d(\\d)?).*", "\\1")),
        ROOT_TYPE = factor(str_extract(img_name, "Se|Cr|postCr")),
        nbt_mean = nbt_intensity / nbt_area,
        nbt_intensity = nbt_intensity / 1e6,
        nbt_area = nbt_area / 1000,
        is_good_data = !(str_detect(img_name, "cancel") | is.na(nbt_area) | is.na(nbt_intensity))
    )

stat_res <- oneway_test(over3leaf, nbt_mean ~ TEMP)$results

y_range <- c(floor(min(stat_res$MIN) * 0.99), ceiling(max(stat_res$MAX) * 1.05))
letter_nudge_y <- (y_range[2] - max(stat_res$MAX)) * 0.43

p1 <- ggplot(over3leaf, aes(TEMP, nbt_mean, color = TEMP, text = img_name)) +
    facet_wrap( ~ factor(ROOT_TYPE, levels = c("Se", "Cr", "postCr")), ncol = 3) +
    theme_bw() +
    labs(
        subtitle = paste0("DAT", unique(over3leaf$DAT)),
        # x = bquote(bold("Temperature ("*degree*"C)")), 
        x = "Temperature (\u00B0C)", 
        y = "NBT intensity"
    ) +
    geom_point(position = position_jitter(width = 0.1)) +
    geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.3, outlier.shape = NA, outliers = FALSE) +
    geom_text(
        data = stat_res,
        mapping = aes(indep_var, MAX + letter_nudge_y, label = letter),
        size = 7,
        inherit.aes = FALSE
    ) +
    scale_y_continuous(limits = y_range) +
    scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set1", direction = -1) +
    theme(
        text = element_text(family = "sans", face = "bold", size = 20),
        axis.title.x.bottom = element_text(margin = margin(t = 10)),
        axis.title.y.left = element_text(margin = margin(r = 10)),
        legend.position = "none"
    )
ggplotly(p1)
```
